title: PATS: Personality-Aware Teaching Strategies with Large Language Model Tutors
authors: Donya Rooein, Sankalan Pal Chowdhury, Mariia Eremeeva, Yuan Qin, Debora Nozza, Mrinmaya Sachan, Dirk Hovy
zh_abstract: PATS将学习者人格特征与教学策略进行匹配，提升LLM导师在互动中的个性化适配。人工教师评估显示该方法在策略合理性上优于基线。

title: Simulated Students in Tutoring Dialogues: Substance or Illusion?
authors: Alexander Scarlatos, Jaewook Lee, Simon Woodhead, Andrew Lan
zh_abstract: 该文系统评估了学生模拟质量，发现简单提示法效果有限。监督微调与偏好优化可改进模拟，但与真实学习者行为仍有差距。

title: Rewarding How Models Think Pedagogically: Integrating Pedagogical Reasoning and Thinking Rewards for LLMs in Education
authors: Unggi Lee, Jiyeong Bae, Jaehyeon Park, Haeun Park, Taejun Park, Younghoon Jeon, Sungmin Cho, Junbo Koh, Yeil Jeong, Gyeonggeon Lee
zh_abstract: 工作提出在教育对话中对“思维链的教学质量”进行奖励，推动模型从“会答题”转向“会教学”。实验显示该策略在跨任务教育评测上具有迁移收益。

title: LLM Prompt Evaluation for Educational Applications
authors: Langdon Holmes, Adam Coscia, Scott Crossley, Joon Suh Choi, Wesley Morris
zh_abstract: 研究给出了教育提示词的系统化评估流程，并用锦标赛式比较不同模板。结果显示融合角色设定与上下文管理的模板在教学追问质量上优势明显。

title: Towards Valid Student Simulation with Large Language Models
authors: Zhihao Yuan, Yunze Xiao, Ming Li, Weihao Xuan, Richard Tong, Mona Diab, Tom Mitchell
zh_abstract: 论文提出“能力悖论”并引入显式认知状态规范，强调学生模拟必须优先保证认识论一致性。该框架为后续可验证模拟与伦理治理提供方法基础。

title: FoundationalASSIST: An Educational Dataset for Foundational Knowledge Tracing and Pedagogical Grounding of LLMs
authors: Eamon Worden, Cristina Heffernan, Neil Heffernan, Shashank Sonkar
zh_abstract: FoundationalASSIST补齐了传统KT数据缺乏文本与错误选项语义的问题，支持LLM教育研究。基准实验表明现有前沿模型在诊断性能力理解上仍明显不足。

title: KASER: Knowledge-Aligned Student Error Simulator for Open-Ended Coding Tasks
authors: Zhangqi Duan, Nigel Fernandez, Andrew Lan
zh_abstract: KASER通过知识对齐与混合奖励强化学生错误模拟，缓解开放式编程任务中的模式坍塌。结果显示其在错误覆盖度和代码多样性上优于现有方法。

title: Multi-Agent Learning Path Planning via LLMs
authors: Haoxin Xu, Changyong Qi, Tong Liu, Bohao Zhang, Anna He, Bingqian Jiang, Longwei Zheng, Xiaoqing Gu
zh_abstract: 该框架通过学习者分析、路径规划与反思代理协作生成可解释学习路径，并引入认知负荷与最近发展区约束。实验在路径质量和知识序列一致性上优于基线。

title: Investigating Self-regulated Learning Sequences within a Generative AI-based Intelligent Tutoring System
authors: Jie Gao, Shasha Li, Jianhua Zhang, Shan Li, Tingting Wang
zh_abstract: 研究基于交互日志分析GenAI辅导系统中的自我调节学习序列。结果发现学生多将AI用于信息获取而非信息转化，提示需加强高阶学习策略引导。

title: Automated Feedback Generation for Undergraduate Mathematics: Development and Evaluation of an AI Teaching Assistant
authors: Aron Gohr, Marie-Amelie Lawn, Kevin Gao, Inigo Serjeant, Stephen Heslip
zh_abstract: 该系统面向本科数学自由文本证明反馈，采用模块化LLM流程输出技术与表达层面的建议。评测显示其反馈质量接近人工专家水平。

title: GuideAI: A Real-time Personalized Learning Solution with Adaptive Interventions
authors: Ananya Shukla, Chaitanya Modi, Satvik Bajpai, Siddharth Siddharth
zh_abstract: GuideAI融合眼动、姿态、心率等多模态信号动态调节学习干预。初步实验显示可提升知识保持并降低认知负荷指标。

title: ConvoLearn: A Dataset of Constructivist Tutor-Student Dialogue
authors: Mayank Sharma, Roy Pea, Hari Subramonyam
zh_abstract: ConvoLearn将建构主义教学维度系统化编码到导师-学生对话数据中。微调实验显示模型在促进提问、反思与共同建构方面显著改进。

title: ALIGNAgent: Adaptive Learner Intelligence for Gap Identification and Next-step guidance
authors: Bismack Tokoli, Luis Jaimes, Ayesha S. Dina
zh_abstract: ALIGNAgent整合能力估计、薄弱点诊断与资源推荐形成闭环个性化学习流程。真实课程数据上其知识评估与后续指导表现较好。

title: CaseMaster: Designing and Evaluating a Probe for Oral Case Presentation Training with LLM Assistance
authors: Yang Ouyang, Yuansong Xu, Chang Jiang, Yifan Jin, Haoran Jiang, Quan Li
zh_abstract: CaseMaster将LLM用于医学口头病例汇报训练中的结构化辅导与反馈。对照研究和专家访谈显示其可提升汇报质量并减轻准备负担。

title: Machine-Assisted Grading of Nationwide School-Leaving Essay Exams with LLMs and Statistical NLP
authors: Andres Karjus, Kais Allkivi, Silvia Maine, Katarin Leppik, Krister Kruusmaa, Merilin Aruvee
zh_abstract: 该研究在国家级作文考试场景下验证LLM辅助评分可达到接近人工评委的一致性。同时指出需保留人工复核与偏差监控以满足高风险评测要求。

title: A Training-Free Large Reasoning Model-based Knowledge Tracing Framework for Unified Prediction and Prescription
authors: Unggi Lee, Joo Young Kim, Ran Ju, Minyoung Jung, Jeyeon Eo
zh_abstract: Thinking-KT提出免训练的测试时扩展知识追踪方法，并将预测、反馈与推荐统一输出。结果显示小模型在合理推理配置下也能取得可用教育性能。
